contenuto:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 600 600" width="100%" height="100%">
  <rect width="600" height="600" fill="#0d0d12"/>
  <!-- Sfondi di tratto cancellati e scritte stratificate -->
  <path d="M50 120 L550 100 M80 140 L520 150" stroke="#222530" stroke-width="12" />
  <text x="70" y="110" font-family="monospace" font-size="28" fill="#333848" font-weight="bold">TIME / CREATE / TIME</text>
  <line x1="65" y1="102" x2="380" y2="102" stroke="#e63946" stroke-width="6" />
  
  <!-- Struttura centrale graffiata -->
  <g stroke="#f1faee" stroke-width="3" fill="none">
    <!-- Figura scheletrica/geometrica -->
    <rect x="220" y="240" width="160" height="220" stroke="#ffb703" stroke-width="4" fill="#14151c" />
    <line x1="220" y1="280" x2="380" y2="280" stroke="#d62828" stroke-width="3" />
    <line x1="220" y1="320" x2="380" y2="320" stroke="#219ebc" stroke-width="3" />
    <line x1="220" y1="360" x2="380" y2="360" stroke="#ffb703" stroke-width="3" />
    <line x1="220" y1="400" x2="380" y2="400" stroke="#f1faee" stroke-width="3" />
    <path d="M240 240 L240 460 M280 240 L280 460 M320 240 L320 460 M360 240 L360 460" stroke="#2a2d3d" stroke-width="2" />
  </g>
  
  <!-- Corona iconica stilizzata -->
  <path d="M210 210 L240 140 L280 180 L300 120 L320 180 L360 140 L390 210 Z" fill="#ffb703" stroke="#e63946" stroke-width="5" stroke-linejoin="round" />
  
  <!-- Dettagli espressivi a pennello/linea -->
  <path d="M120 300 Q180 250 200 350 T280 480" stroke="#e63946" stroke-width="5" fill="none" stroke-dasharray="10 5" />
  <path d="M420 200 L480 380 L520 220" stroke="#219ebc" stroke-width="4" fill="none" />
  
  <!-- Testi sovrascritti e barrati -->
  <text x="230" y="210" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="20" fill="#0d0d12" font-weight="900">A D E</text>
  <text x="100" y="500" font-family="monospace" font-size="18" fill="#e63946">[ NOT A PERFECT SYSTEM ]</text>
  <text x="320" y="530" font-family="monospace" font-size="16" fill="#ffb703">© 2026 PALIMPSEST</text>
</svg>
